    C

    Connectable - Interface in Unnamed Package
    Interface representing WiFi connectivity capability.
    connectToWiFi() - Method in interface Connectable
    Connects the device to WiFi.
    connectToWiFi() - Method in class SmartLight
    Connects smart light to WiFi.

    G

    getBrand() - Method in class SmartDevice
    Gets brand name.
    getBrightness() - Method in class SmartLight
    Gets brightness level.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class Main

    Main class to test Smart Home system.

    S

    setBrightness(int) - Method in class SmartLight
    Sets brightness level.
    SmartDevice - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a generic smart device.

    Constructor to initialize device.
    SmartLight - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a smart light device.

    T

    Toggles power state of device.
